title: HOMESHOPA 2 White Spoon Rest, Plastic Spoon Rests for Kitchen Dishwasher Safe Resting Cooking Spoons Heavy Duty Food Grade Plastic Handle with Hanging Hole
features: KEEPS YOUR KITCHEN COUNTERS SPOTLESS & ORGANIZED:- Measuring 29.5 cm in length and 11 cm in width, these generously sized spoon rests offer ample space to hold your cooking tools, keeping your counters clean from drips, splashes, and sauces. Perfect for maintaining a tidy workspace while you cook.

PREMIUM FOOD-GRADE PLASTIC:- Crafted from thick, food-grade plastic, these 2 white spoon rests are sturdy, durable, and safe for use with hot utensils. Heat-resistant and built to withstand daily kitchen use without cracking, warping, or staining.

QUICK & EASY CLEANING:- Forget the hassle of scrubbing sticky residues! These spoon rests feature a smooth, non-stick surface that rinses clean with ease. For a deeper clean, simply pop them into the dishwasher—making cleanup fast, hygienic, and completely stress-free.

SPACE-SAVING WITH BUILT-IN HANGING HOLE:- The practical handle includes a built-in hanging hole, allowing you to hang the spoon rests on a hook or rack when not in use. Ideal for keeping your kitchen organized and saving drawer or counter space.

STYLISH & FUNCTIONAL SET OF 2 FOR EVERYDAY USE:- This set includes two sleek white spoon rests that blend seamlessly with any kitchen décor. Whether you’re stirring soup, frying veggies, or baking cookies, these rests are perfect for holding spoons, spatulas, ladles, and more.
description: Double the Rest, Double the Convenience - With HOMESHOPA Spoon Rests Keep your kitchen surfaces clean and clutter-free with the HOMESHOPA 2-Piece White Spoon Rest Set. Each rest measures 29.5 x 11 cm, offering ample space for spoons, spatulas, lids, and more. Made from durable, high-quality plastic, they’re perfect for everyday cooking, serving, and meal prep. The smooth finish is easy to clean—dishwasher safe or hand-washable. Stackable for compact storage, they’re ideal for stovetops, countertops, coffee stations, camping trips, and buffet setups. Generous Size for All Utensils: Each spoon rest measures 29.5 cm long and 11 cm wide, large enough to hold cooking spoons, spatulas, ladles, tongs, lids, and more. Durable & Food-Safe Plastic: Made from premium-quality, BPA-free plastic that is strong, heat-resistant, and safe for daily use in any busy kitchen. Set of 2 – No More Sharing or Waiting: Comes as a pair so you and your family can cook together without needing to share one spoon holder. Versatile & Stackable: Ideal for countertops, stovetops, buffet tables, or outdoor cooking. Easily stack them when not in use to save space. Easy to Clean – Dishwasher Safe: Smooth, brushed finish makes cleaning a breeze. Simply rinse or place them in the dishwasher for quick and hygienic reuse. Clean Counters. Happy Cooking. Keeping Kitchens Neat, One Spoon at a Time
